title: NUM NUM Dweller
description: NUM NUM Dweller is a custom horror entity mod that adds a terrifying creature to Minecraft, creating fear, tension, and intense survival gameplay.
body:
⚠️ Disclaimer

This mod is for horror gameplay purposes.
Recommended for players who enjoy fear-based and intense survival experiences.


🩸 NUM NUM Dweller

NUM NUM Dweller is a high-quality horror entity mod that introduces a terrifying custom creature into your Minecraft world.
Designed to create fear, tension, and psychological pressure, this mod transforms normal survival gameplay into a true horror experience.

This entity is not just a mob — it is a presence.
It stalks, observes, and hunts the player, creating an atmosphere of suspense and constant danger.

👁️ Features

Custom horror entity (NUM NUM Dweller)

Intelligent stalking behavior

Fear-based gameplay mechanics

Immersive survival horror experience

Smooth animations and performance-optimized design

Balanced difficulty for survival worlds

Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer

🎮 Gameplay Experience

NUM NUM Dweller is designed to:

Create paranoia and tension

Force players to stay alert

Add psychological fear, not just combat

Make exploration dangerous and unpredictable

Every encounter feels intense and cinematic.

⚙️ Compatibility

Works in Singleplayer

Works in Multiplayer / Servers

Designed for Client + Server

Performance optimized

🎯 Purpose

This mod is built for:

Horror survival worlds

Scary SMP servers

Horror content creators

Challenge gameplay

Cinematic modpacks

🧠 Concept

The NUM NUM Dweller is inspired by psychological horror rather than simple jumpscares —
focusing on presence, fear, silence, and unpredictability.

🛠 Developed By

G-TECH
High-quality Minecraft mods, tools, and creative tech projects.
